title: Aurora, 33476, Palm Pals Stomps Elephant, 5In, Soft Toy, Grey
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Elephant cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: This cute Elephant named Stomp fits into the palm of your hand he is full of beans which makes him super soft and cuddly His body is a soft grey plush material Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion whether it is for a birthday or Christmas everyone will fall in love with this adorable Elephant Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products
